MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE
Off Calendar Sep-12-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorney, Lydia Diane Goldman of the law offices of Carbone Smoke Smith Bent & Leonard (510-267-7275) appears by teephone as counsel for defendant/moving

No other appearance is made in this matter

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

DEFENDANT LOUIS BURLINGAME MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE to Contra Costa County is granted. San Francisco County is not a proper venue for this case. Plaintiff Carl Westcott to pay all costs of transfer. The prevailing party shall submit a [proposed] written order that tracks the Court's ruling, verbatim and that complies with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Not reported. (D302)

No other appearance is made in this matter

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

DEFENDANT LOUIS BURLINGAME DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT, as to counts 2 and 3 in the first amended complaint filed by plaintiff Carl Westcott is off calendar in light of the ruling on the motion to transfer.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Not reported. (D302)
